query: DELETE FROM credit_card_items WHERE userId = 1 AND description = 'Supermercado Teste'; DELETE FROM credit_card_invoices WHERE userId = 1 AND creditCardId = (SELECT id FROM credit_cards WHERE userId = 1 AND name = 'Nubank Teste' LIMIT 1); DELETE FROM credit_cards WHERE userId = 1 AND name = 'Nubank Teste';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kFLXQuFv4V4Y4E.cb116c6777a1 --database S72dXysLKGdD9WHAuQpZuU --execute DELETE FROM credit_card_items WHERE userId = 1 AND description = 'Supermercado Teste'; DELETE FROM credit_card_invoices WHERE userId = 1 AND creditCardId = (SELECT id FROM credit_cards WHERE userId = 1 AND name = 'Nubank Teste' LIMIT 1); DELETE FROM credit_cards WHERE userId = 1 AND name = 'Nubank Teste';
